sql_array: CREATE TABLE geo_data (id UInt32, pentagon_index UInt64, resolution UInt8) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT h3GetPentagonIndexes(resolution) AS indexes FROM geo_data WHERE resolution = 3 GLOBAL NOT IN (SELECT resolution FROM geo_data WHERE pentagon_index IS NULL);
SELECT id, h3GetPentagonIndexes(resolution) AS pentagon_indexes FROM geo_data WHERE pentagon_index NOT IN (SELECT pentagon_index FROM geo_data WHERE resolution = 3) GROUP BY id ORDER BY id;

SELECT id, arrayJoin(h3GetPentagonIndexes(resolution)) AS pentagon_indexes FROM geo_data WHERE resolution BETWEEN 0 AND 15 HAVING pentagon_indexes GLOBAL NOT IN (SELECT pentagon_index FROM geo_data WHERE id = 1);
CREATE TABLE test_data (val String, num UInt8) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY val;
SELECT h3GetPentagonIndexes(num) AS indexes FROM test_data WHERE num GLOBAL NOT IN (SELECT num FROM test_data WHERE val = 'def') AND val IS NOT NULL;
SELECT h3GetPentagonIndexes(CAST(NULL AS UInt8)) AS empty_index FROM test_data WHERE num = 0 GLOBAL NOT IN (SELECT num FROM test_data WHERE num IS NOT NULL);
SELECT h3GetPentagonIndexes(num) AS indexes FROM test_data GROUP BY num HAVING indexes GLOBAL NOT IN (SELECT h3GetPentagonIndexes(3) FROM geo_data) ORDER BY indexes;
